# GoClaw

> GoClaw is a multi-agent AI gateway written in Go. It connects LLMs to tools, channels, and data via WebSocket RPC and OpenAI-compatible HTTP API. Supports 13+ LLM providers, agent teams, delegation, quality gates, MCP integration, and multi-tenant PostgreSQL.

## Documentation

### Getting Started
- [What is GoClaw?](https://docs.goclaw.sh/getting-started/what-is-goclaw.md): Overview, key features, operating modes
- [Installation](https://docs.goclaw.sh/getting-started/installation.md): Binary, Docker, build from source
- [Quick Start](https://docs.goclaw.sh/getting-started/quick-start.md): First agent in 5 minutes
- [Configuration](https://docs.goclaw.sh/getting-started/configuration.md): config.json, env vars, hot-reload
- [Dashboard Tour](https://docs.goclaw.sh/getting-started/web-dashboard-tour.md): Visual walkthrough of web UI
- [Migrating from OpenClaw](https://docs.goclaw.sh/getting-started/migrating-from-openclaw.md): Config mapping, feature comparison

### Core Concepts
- [How GoClaw Works](https://docs.goclaw.sh/core-concepts/how-goclaw-works.md): Architecture, message flow, Think-Act-Observe cycle
- [Agents Explained](https://docs.goclaw.sh/core-concepts/agents-explained.md): Open vs Predefined, lifecycle, context
- [Sessions & History](https://docs.goclaw.sh/core-concepts/sessions-and-history.md): Session keys, history pipeline, auto-compaction
- [Tools Overview](https://docs.goclaw.sh/core-concepts/tools-overview.md): 60+ tools, 12 categories, execution flow
- [Memory System](https://docs.goclaw.sh/core-concepts/memory-system.md): Hybrid search, embeddings, memory flush
- [Multi-Tenancy](https://docs.goclaw.sh/core-concepts/multi-tenancy.md): Identity propagation, per-user scoping, agent sharing

### Agents
- [Creating Agents](https://docs.goclaw.sh/agents/creating-agents.md): Step-by-step agent creation
- [Open vs Predefined](https://docs.goclaw.sh/agents/open-vs-predefined.md): Comparison and when to use each
- [Context Files](https://docs.goclaw.sh/agents/context-files.md): 7 context file types
- [System Prompts](https://docs.goclaw.sh/agents/system-prompt-anatomy.md): 15+ system prompt sections
- [Summoning & Bootstrap](https://docs.goclaw.sh/agents/summoning-bootstrap.md): @mention, slash commands, pairing
- [Editing Personality](https://docs.goclaw.sh/agents/editing-personality.md): Customize agent behavior
- [Sharing & Access](https://docs.goclaw.sh/agents/sharing-and-access.md): Agent sharing and access control
- [User Overrides](https://docs.goclaw.sh/agents/user-overrides.md): Per-user customization

### Providers
- [Provider Overview](https://docs.goclaw.sh/providers/overview.md): All 13+ supported LLM providers
- [Anthropic (Claude)](https://docs.goclaw.sh/providers/anthropic.md)
- [OpenAI / Azure OpenAI](https://docs.goclaw.sh/providers/openai.md)
- [OpenRouter](https://docs.goclaw.sh/providers/openrouter.md)
- [Google Gemini](https://docs.goclaw.sh/providers/gemini.md)
- [DeepSeek](https://docs.goclaw.sh/providers/deepseek.md)
- [Groq](https://docs.goclaw.sh/providers/groq.md)
- [Mistral](https://docs.goclaw.sh/providers/mistral.md)
- [xAI (Grok)](https://docs.goclaw.sh/providers/xai.md)
- [MiniMax](https://docs.goclaw.sh/providers/minimax.md)
- [Cohere](https://docs.goclaw.sh/providers/cohere.md)
- [Perplexity](https://docs.goclaw.sh/providers/perplexity.md)
- [DashScope (Qwen)](https://docs.goclaw.sh/providers/dashscope.md)
- [Claude CLI](https://docs.goclaw.sh/providers/claude-cli.md)
- [Codex / ChatGPT](https://docs.goclaw.sh/providers/codex-chatgpt.md)
- [Custom / OpenAI-Compatible](https://docs.goclaw.sh/providers/custom-provider.md)
- [Fallback & Routing](https://docs.goclaw.sh/providers/overview.md#fallback--routing): Multi-provider resilience
